content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Nurse
description: Legendary Nurse is a legendary Siren class mod for Maya, made by Anshin in Borderlands 2. It can drop from chubby enemies from level 62 onwards in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode.
notes:
Added with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two and unavailable without that DLC.

The class mod emblem references Liliths Phasewalk action skill.

special.description:
Max level bonus: Team health regeneration per second +40,398.

Provides team health regen up to +30,467 depending on roll.

May roll up to +5 in Restoration, Elated, Sweet Release, Sustenance and Suspension.

Flavour text: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
special.title: "A friend in need is a friend indeed."
